shifts.title: Downtown LB Farmers Market Pickup
shifts.description: Collect donated groceries from vendors at the Downtown Long Beach Farmers Market
shifts.locationAddress: 315-412 The Promenade N, Long Beach, CA
shifts.notes: Pick up bins at Bargain Liquor (3036 E. 4th St, LB 90814) first. At the market, check in with Jaqueline at the info tent at the front. Record how much food each vendor donates and upload to the calendar. Drop-off back at Bargain Liquor. On-site contact: Jaqueline 562-538-9819

shifts.title: Prepared Food Transfer
shifts.description: Transport prepared food from Bargain Liquor to the distribution center
shifts.notes: Meet with Elissa and Michael at Bargain Liquor to help transport prepared food to the distribution center. Drop-off: 5200 East The Toledo, Long Beach 90803. On-site contact: Elissa Alvarez 818-282-5444

shifts.title: Food Finders Pickup
shifts.description: Pickup from Food Finders van, deliver to Bargain Liquor
shifts.locationAddress: 2125 Santa Fe Ave, Long Beach, CA 90810
shifts.notes: Enter the parking lot off of Hill & Santa Fe. The Food Finders van will be waiting in the parking lot. Food is already boxed up and volunteers will be there to help load. Drop-off: Bargain Liquor, 3036 E. 4th St, Long Beach 90814. On-site contact: Kelly
